nasb.text: But the king was enraged, and he sent his armies and destroyed those murderers and set their city on fire.

esv.text: The king was angry, and he sent his troops and destroyed those murderers and burned their city.

cnv.text: 王就發怒，派兵消滅那些兇手，焚毀他們的城。

ccb.text: 王大怒，派军队去剿灭凶手，烧毁他们的城。

csbs.text: 王就发怒，派军兵除灭那些凶手，烧毁了他们的城。
